description:
Saving a partial form as a draft must:
  1. Enable the 'Save as Draft' button once any field has a value.
  2. Persist the draft so that the Drafts tab shows one more row than before.

steps.name: Go to Add Deal page (New Client mode)
Count draft rows in Drafts tab
